fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Utah Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Utah — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license utah, dental assistant certification utah, RDA utah, DANB CDA utah, dental assistant radiography utah

license_types.title: Licensed Dental Assistant
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Utah.

steps.title: Complete Education/Training
steps.description: Complete a CODA-accredited dental assisting program or gain on-the-job training under a licensed dentist.

steps.title: Obtain Required Certifications
steps.description: Obtain DANB CDA certification or pass state-specific exams as required.

steps.title: Apply for State Credential
steps.description: Submit application to the Utah Division of Professional Licensing with required documentation and fees.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Licensed Dental Assistant through the Utah Division of Professional Licensing by license.

faqs.question: Does Utah require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Utah requires Licensed Dental Assistant through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Utah?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Utah.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Utah?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Utah?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $55. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Dental assistants can apply for Licensed Dental Assistant through the Utah Division of Professional Licensing by license.
